databaseQueries.query: SELECT `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` WHERE `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (1) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'

SELECT `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` WHERE `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (1) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
SELECT `municipality`, `code` FROM `municipalities` WHERE `code` IS not NULL
SELECT `municipality`, `code` FROM `municipalities` WHERE `code` IS not NULL
SELECT * FROM `agricultural_professionals` WHERE `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` = 1 and `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` IS not NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM `farmers` WHERE `app_no` like 'COF-2026-03-%' ORDER BY `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO `farms` (`farmer_id`, `farm_name`, `farmer_address_bgy`, `farmer_address_mun`, `farmer_address_prv`, `crop_name`, `crop_variety`, `crop_area`, `soil_type`, `latitude`, `longtitude`, `status`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) VALUES (1, 'Gonzales Farm', '01-0001', '01', 'Davao de Oro', 'Coffee', 'Arabica', '1', 'Clay', '7.677389', '126.084594', 'pending', '2026-03-17 19:44:05', '2026-03-17 19:44:05')
SELECT * FROM `farmers` ORDER BY `farmers`.`id` ASC LIMIT 10 offset 0

notifications.subject: CAFARM - Your Account Has Been Registered
notifications.content:
CAFARM

Coffee Agriculture Farm Management

Dear ,

Your account has been successfully registered in the CAFARM system. Below are your account details:

Application No. COF-2026-03-00001
Name
Crop Coffee

Mobile App Login Credentials:

Application No: COF-2026-03-00001

Default Password: cafarm123

You can use the CAFARM mobile app to access your account. Please change your password after your first login for security purposes.

If you have any questions, please contact your local agricultural office.

Thank you,
CAFARM Team

This is an automated message from the CAFARM System. Please do not reply to this email.
